rationale: The cited paper is topically related (both study spousal/household decision conflict processes), and it could plausibly be a background or foundational source for marital purchase-decision dynamics. However, the provided evidence is only a single DOI match (no in-text citation context), and the focal constructs differ substantially (tightwad-spendthrift gaps and financial harmony vs. coercive/noncoercive influence dynamics), so substantive use is unclear.
